_comment: Edit these numbers to update cost-of-living figures site-wide. nationalBaseline.rent is averaged across all cities currently in researched-rent.json (21 as of last edit) - recompute this average whenever a city is added to or removed from that file. categoryDampening controls how much each category swings relative to a city's overall costOfLivingIndex (1.0 = same swing as overall, lower = more stable than overall, higher = more volatile than overall).
